text.title: Chaos Engineering Practice for Infra Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Chaos Engineering Practice for Infra output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: true if full team on-call during experiment

forbidden.pattern: experiment runs off-hours before 6 successful daytime runs
action_items is empty AND experiment completed

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: experiment_id populated with a typed value
steady_state_hypothesis populated with a typed value
blast_radius populated with a typed value
tool populated with a typed value
on_call_present populated with a typed value
action_items populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
